name: Riverside of Dice
short_description: The boy found himself by the river. A table, dice, and a cat are in front of him. A simple dice-based combat.
detailed_description:
A boy in a raincoat finds himself by the river.
A black cat suddenly appears in front of him and challenges the boy to a fight.
Can the boy defeat all the cats?

Simple combat with dice

Damage to the cats is determined by the total value of the dice.
A specific dice combination will deal more damage!

Upgrading with charms

You can buy charms with the coins you get by defeating cats.
The various effects of charms will help the boy.

Stress-free game experience

Each game takes about 5 to 10 minutes.
The game is very simple so that you don't get tired.
Calm music, the sound of dice, and the cat's meow are waiting for you.
